mapper.select: select d.id as dishId, null as setmealId, 'dish' as itemType, d.name, d.price, d.status, c.name as category, c.status as categoryStatus, group_concat(distinct dt.tag_name order by dt.tag_name separator ',') as tagNames, ifnull(s.sales_count, 0) as salesCount, d.image, d.description from dish d left join category c on d.category_id = c.id left join dish_tag dt on d.id = dt.dish_id left join ( select dish_id, sum(sales_count) as sales_count from dish_sales_stat where stat_date >= date_sub(curdate(), interval 30 day) group by dish_id ) s on d.id = s.dish_id where d.status = 1 and c.status = 1 group by d.id, d.name, d.price, d.status, c.name, c.status, s.sales_count, d.image, d.description order by salesCount desc, d.update_time desc

select s.id as setmealId, null as dishId, 'setmeal' as itemType, s.name, s.price, s.status, c.name as category, c.status as categoryStatus, group_concat(distinct dt.tag_name order by dt.tag_name separator ',') as tagNames, ifnull(sum(case when o.status = 5 and o.order_time >= date_sub(now(), interval 30 day) then od.number else 0 end), 0) as salesCount, s.image, s.description from setmeal s left join category c on s.category_id = c.id left join setmeal_dish sd on s.id = sd.setmeal_id left join dish_tag dt on sd.dish_id = dt.dish_id left join order_detail od on s.id = od.setmeal_id left join orders o on od.order_id = o.id where s.status = 1 and c.status = 1 group by s.id, s.name, s.price, s.status, c.name, c.status, s.image, s.description order by salesCount desc, s.update_time desc

select od.dish_id as dishId, od.setmeal_id as setmealId, od.name as dishName, c.name as category, group_concat(distinct dt.tag_name order by dt.tag_name separator ',') as tagNames, sum(od.number) as count from orders o inner join order_detail od on o.id = od.order_id left join dish d on od.dish_id = d.id left join setmeal s on od.setmeal_id = s.id left join category c on c.id = ifnull(d.category_id, s.category_id) left join setmeal_dish sd on s.id = sd.setmeal_id left join dish_tag dt on dt.dish_id = ifnull(d.id, sd.dish_id) where o.user_id = #{userId} and o.status = 5 and o.order_time >= #{beginTime} group by od.dish_id, od.setmeal_id, od.name, c.name order by count desc
mapper.insert: insert into recommend_session (user_id, user_query, parsed_intent, create_time) values (#{userId}, #{userQuery}, #{parsedIntent}, #{createTime})
insert into recommend_result (session_id, dish_id, setmeal_id, score, reason, rank_no, create_time) values (#{sessionId}, #{dishId}, #{setmealId}, #{score}, #{reason}, #{rankNo}, #{createTime})

insert into agent_tool_call_log (session_id, tool_name, request_params, response_summary, success, cost_ms, create_time) values (#{sessionId}, #{toolName}, #{requestParams}, #{responseSummary}, #{success}, #{costMs}, #{createTime})
